record.fldAkpl3cuzgz1jLP: Make Upload Engine stopped safely: Missing fresh Airtable attachment URL from Submission Assets record. Check Airtable Attachment field and retry.

authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

expect.name: stopOnHttpError
expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails

expect.label: Share cookies with other HTTP modules

metadata.notes: HTTP Airtable API duplicate hash lookup. Returns records:[] when no match — scenario continues to Drive upload.

record.Duplicate Match Notes: {{if(empty(50.sha256); "Hash helper did not return sha256. Upload continued, but duplicate detection could not be completed."; if(empty(52.records[1].id); "No matching file hash found."; concat("Exact duplicate file content. Same SHA-256 hash already exists on Submission Asset "; 52.records[1].id; " - "; 52.records[1].fields.`Submission Assets Full Name`; ". Review before correcting again.")))}}
record.Duplicate Check Error: {{if(empty(50.sha256); "Hash helper did not return sha256. Check Module 50 response and hash helper endpoint."; "")}}
